name: metabase
description: Query saved questions, dashboards, and databases on a Metabase instance

requiredApis.name: Metabase API Keys (Admin settings > Authentication > API keys)

envVars.name: METABASE_API_KEY
envVars.description: Metabase API key (created in Admin settings > Authentication > API keys)

tools.name: List Databases
tools.description: List databases connected to the Metabase instance

host.description: Your Metabase hostname without protocol, e.g. acme.metabaseapp.com or metabase.internal.example.com. Metabase is self-hosted or cloud-tenant, so there is no default.

historicalSummary.omitted: connection details and provider-specific payload fields

tools.name: List Questions
tools.description: List saved questions (cards) on the Metabase instance

host.description: Your Metabase hostname without protocol, e.g. acme.metabaseapp.com

f.description: Filter: all, mine, archived, bookmarked, database, table, or using_model

tools.name: Run Question Query
tools.description: Execute a saved question (card) and return its query results

host.description: Your Metabase hostname without protocol, e.g. acme.metabaseapp.com

tools.name: Search
tools.description: Search questions, dashboards, collections, and tables across the instance

host.description: Your Metabase hostname without protocol, e.g. acme.metabaseapp.com

models.description: Restrict to a model type: card, dashboard, collection, database, table, dataset

tools.name: Get Dashboard
tools.description: Get a dashboard and its cards by ID

host.description: Your Metabase hostname without protocol, e.g. acme.metabaseapp.com

tools.name: List Collections
tools.description: List collections that organize questions and dashboards

host.description: Your Metabase hostname without protocol, e.g. acme.metabaseapp.com

prompts.title: Find a question
prompts.prompt: Search my Metabase instance for questions about a topic and run the most relevant one.

prompts.title: Summarize a dashboard
prompts.prompt: Get one of my Metabase dashboards and summarize what each card shows.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: Metabase API Setup

steps.title: Locate your Metabase instance
steps.description: Note your instance hostname, e.g. acme.metabaseapp.com (Metabase Cloud) or your self-hosted domain. Every tool takes it as the required 'host' parameter. For local testing you can run Metabase with 'docker run -p 3000:3000 metabase/metabase'.

steps.title: Create an API key
steps.description: As an admin, go to Admin settings > Authentication > API keys, create a key, and assign it to a group whose permissions cover the databases and collections you need. Copy the key (shown once, prefixed mb_).

steps.title: Set the environment variable
steps.description: Add the key to your .env as METABASE_API_KEY=mb_...

steps.title: Verify access
steps.description: Run List Databases with your hostname as the host parameter.

notes: Metabase is self-hosted or tenant-hosted, so tools require a 'host' parameter (hostname only, HTTPS is assumed) on every call
The API key inherits the permissions of the group it is assigned to
